shadows.name: chart-label-shadow
shadows.purpose: Only sanctioned shadow: keeps chart-overlay labels legible over data traces.

motion.name: state-fade
motion.purpose: Marker/panel state changes; instant under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Button
components.css: .ds-btn { background: #1a2030; color: #e8edf5; border: 1px solid rgba(100,140,220,0.15); border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 12px; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, border-color 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-btn:hover { background: #212840; border-color: #4a9eff; color: #7bc4ff; } .ds-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4a9eff; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Mono Badge
components.description: Numeric/status badge in the data mono stack.
components.css: .ds-badge { font-family: 'SF Mono', 'Fira Code', Consolas, monospace; font-size: 12px; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; border: 1px solid rgba(100,140,220,0.3); color: #8a9ab8; background: #1a2030; }

components.name: Panel
components.css: .ds-panel { background: #131720; border: 1px solid rgba(100,140,220,0.15); border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px; color: #e8edf5; font-size: 13px; } .ds-panel-h { font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; color: #8a9ab8; margin-bottom: 8px; }

components.name: State Chip
components.css: .ds-chip-amber { font-size: 11px; padding: 1px 7px; border-radius: 3px; background: rgba(255,187,68,0.15); border: 1px solid #ffbb44; color: #ffbb44; }

narrative.overview: The front panel of a piece of lab instrumentation: a deep blue-black tonal chassis where only the data glows. Density is a feature; chrome recedes; provenance is always one glance away.
keyCharacteristics: Dark tonal chassis (4-step ramp), hairline borders, no shadows
Saturated color reserved for data, markers, and state
Mono font for every numeric value

rules.name: The Luminous Data Rule
rules.body: Saturated color belongs to data and state only; chrome lives in the blue-gray ramp.

rules.name: The Tint-Not-Fill Rule
rules.body: Selection and emphasis use 15%-alpha dim variants behind full-strength text.

rules.name: The Mono Numbers Rule
rules.body: A numeric value rendered in the sans stack is a defect.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Depth = one step up the background ramp + a hairline border. Never a box-shadow.

dos: Do reserve saturated color for data, markers, and state
Do render every numeric value in the mono stack
Do pair every color-coded chip with a text label
Do keep panel copy non-definitive: candidate, possible, expected region
Do preserve chart zoom on every in-place update
donts: Don't import marketing-site expressiveness (heroes, gradient washes, decorative motion, glassmorphism)
Don't build dashboard theater (big-number cards, chartjunk, color as decoration)
Don't ship UI language that says 'identified as'
Don't repeat the legacy gradient-text header pattern
